mxCell.value: - id: int - name: String - rating: double
+ getId(): int + getName(): String + getRating(): double + setId(int): void + setName(String): void + setRating(double): void

- id: int - bankId: int - name: String - type: DepositType - currency: String - minAmount: double - interestRate: double - termMonths: int - canWithdrawEarly: boolean - canReplenish: boolean - penaltyRate: double

+ calculateProfit(double, int): double {abstract} + calculateTotalReturn(double, int): double + getId(): int + getBankId(): int + getName(): String + getType(): DepositType + getMinAmount(): double + getInterestRate(): double + getTermMonths(): int + isCanWithdrawEarly(): boolean + isCanReplenish(): boolean + getPenaltyRate(): double
- id: int - firstName: String - lastName: String - email: String
+ getId(): int + getFirstName(): String + getLastName(): String + getEmail(): String + getFullName(): String
- id: int - clientId: int - depositId: int - amount: double - openedAt: String - status: String
+ getId(): int + getClientId(): int + getDepositId(): int + getAmount(): double + getStatus(): String + setStatus(String): void
- id: int - username: String - passwordHash: String - role: String
+ getId(): int + getUsername(): String + getPasswordHash(): String + getRole(): String
(inherits Deposit) canReplenish = true canWithdrawEarly = true termMonths = 0
+ save(Bank): Bank + findById(int): Optional<Bank> + findAll(): List<Bank> + findByName(String): List<Bank> + delete(int): void

+ save(Deposit): Deposit + findById(int): Optional<Deposit> + findAll(): List<Deposit> + findByBankId(int): List<Deposit> + findByType(DepositType): List<Deposit> + findByCurrency(String): List<Deposit> + findByInterestRateBetween(double,double): List<Deposit> + delete(int): void
+ save(Client): Client + findById(int): Optional<Client> + findAll(): List<Client> + findByLastName(String): List<Client> + delete(int): void
+ save(ClientDeposit): ClientDeposit + findById(int): Optional<ClientDeposit> + findByClientId(int): List<ClientDeposit> + delete(int): void
+ findByUsername(String): Optional<User> + authenticate(String, String): boolean + save(User): void + ensureDefaultAdmin(): void
+ save(Bank): Bank + findById(int): Optional<Bank> + findAll(): List<Bank> + findByName(String): List<Bank> + delete(int): void
+ save(Deposit): Deposit + findById(int): Optional<Deposit> + findAll(): List<Deposit> + findByBankId(int): List<Deposit> + findByType(DepositType): List<Deposit> ...
+ save(Client): Client + findById(int): Optional<Client> + findAll(): List<Client> + findByLastName(String): List<Client> + delete(int): void
+ save(ClientDeposit): ClientDeposit + findById(int): Optional<ClientDeposit> + findByClientId(int): List<ClientDeposit> + delete(int): void
+ findByUsername(String): Optional<User> + authenticate(String, String): boolean + save(User): void + ensureDefaultAdmin(): void

+ createBank(Bank): Bank + updateBank(Bank): Bank + deleteBank(int): void + getBankById(int): Optional<Bank> + getAllBanks(): List<Bank> + getDepositsByBank(int): List<Deposit> + searchBanksByName(String): List<Bank>
- depositRepo: DepositRepository - clientRepo: ClientRepository - clientDepositRepo: ClientDepositRepository

+ createDeposit(Deposit): Deposit + updateDeposit(Deposit): Deposit + deleteDeposit(int): void + getAllDeposits(): List<Deposit> + getDepositsByType(DepositType): List<Deposit> + openDeposit(int, int, double): ClientDeposit + closeDeposit(int): void + calculateExpectedReturn(int, int): double + createClient(Client): Client + getAllClients(): List<Client>

+ sort(List<Deposit>, SortField, boolean): List<Deposit> + filterByType(List<Deposit>, DepositType): List<Deposit> + filterByCurrency(List<Deposit>, String): List<Deposit> + filterByBankId(List<Deposit>, int): List<Deposit> + filterByWithdrawable(List<Deposit>): List<Deposit> + filterByReplenishable(List<Deposit>): List<Deposit> + filterByInterestRateRange(List, double, double): List<Deposit> + filterByMinAmountRange(List, double, double): List<Deposit> + filterByTermMonthsRange(List, int, int): List<Deposit> + applyFilters(List<Deposit>, DepositFilter): List<Deposit>

- type: DepositType - currency: String - bankId: Integer - canWithdrawEarly: Boolean - canReplenish: Boolean - minInterestRate: Double - maxInterestRate: Double - minMinAmount: Double - maxMinAmount: Double - minTermMonths: Integer - maxTermMonths: Integer
+ getType(): DepositType + getCurrency(): String + getBankId(): Integer ... (getters / setters)
+ getLogger(Class): AppLogger {static} + info(String, Object...): void + warn(String, Object...): void + error(String, Throwable): void + debug(String, Object...): void
- host: String - port: int - username: String - password: String
- instance: AppContext {static} - depositService: DepositService - bankService: BankService - searchFilterService: SearchFilterService
+ getInstance(): AppContext {static} + getDepositService(): DepositService + getBankService(): BankService + getSearchFilterService(): SearchFilterService
+ initialize(): void + onAdd(): void + onEdit(): void + onDelete(): void
+ initialize(): void + onAdd(): void + onEdit(): void + onDelete(): void
+ initialize(): void + onSave(): void + onCancel(): void
+ initialize(): void + onAdd(): void + onOpenDeposit(): void
+ initialize(): void + onSearch(): void + onReset(): void
